name: Maggie
description: Five rounds of handstand push-ups, pull-ups, and alternating pistols at escalating per-movement volume — a gymnastics-heavy sibling of Mary, compressed into a fixed five-round interval rather than an open AMRAP.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
